message:
fix(btree): validate page_size >= usable_size in build_page

Same defensive check as the overflow chain validation in afee71c6 —
prevents a buffer overflow panic if a programming error passes
page_size < usable_size to build_page, which would cause content_offset
to exceed the page buffer bounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
